Text: These things are accounted. Still it is silent, still it is calm.
Subject: primordial world

Text: There is not yet one person, one animal, bird, fish, tree, rock, canyon, or meadow.
Subject: world

Text: Merely alone sky exists. Not clear its face.
Subject: sky

Text: Tree, Rock, Hollow, Canyon, Meadow,.
Subject: unknown

Text: Forest.
Subject: unknown

Text: Merely alone sky exists, Not clear its face earth, Merely alone is spread out sea, Its womb sky everything.
Subject: unknown

Text: There is not anything Gathered together, It is at rest, Not one stirs, Scattered it is made to be,.
Subject: unknown

Text: At rest it is made to be in sky.
Subject: unknown

Text: There was not yet anything that exists standing erect.
Subject: unknown

Text: Merely spread out water, Merely tranquil sea, Merely alone it is spread out.
Subject: unknown

Text: There was not yet anything that might exist.
Subject: unknown

Text: Merely it is placid, It is silent, In darkness, In night.
Subject: unknown

Text: Merely alone the Framer, Shaper, Sovereign, Quetzal Serpent, They Who Have Borne Children,.
Subject: unknown

Text: They Who Have Begotten Sons, Are in water.
Subject: unknown

Text: Luminous they are, Covered in quetzal feathers, In cotinga feathers.
Subject: unknown

Text: This his having been named The Quetzal Serpent.
Subject: unknown

Text: Great sages, Great knowers in their essence.
Subject: unknown

Text: Thus surely there is the sky,.
Subject: unknown

Text: There is also its Heart Sky.
Subject: unknown

Text: This his name The god as it is said.
Subject: unknown
